scripts.build: node scripts/check-syntax.mjs && node scripts/verify-release-metadata.mjs && node scripts/verify-exports.mjs && node scripts/verify-boundaries.mjs && node scripts/verify-desktop-boundaries.mjs && node scripts/verify-anti-rpg.mjs && node scripts/verify-fixtures.mjs && npm run build:dashboard && npm run build:hosted
scripts.build:release: npm run verify && npm run build:player:windows:if-supported && node scripts/build-release.mjs
scripts.build:desktop: npm run verify && npm run desktop:prepare && npm run desktop:portable
scripts.dev:desktop: npm run build:dashboard && npm run desktop:prepare && npm run start -w @reigns-agent/desktop-electron
scripts.desktop:make: npm run desktop:prepare && npm run desktop:portable
scripts.test:desktop: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test/desktop && npm run desktop:prepare && npm exec -- electron apps/desktop-electron --smoke-test
scripts.test:desktop:ci: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test/desktop && npm run desktop:prepare && npm exec -- electron apps/desktop-electron --smoke-test --no-sandbox
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
